x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Holder
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity whose account is debited and who authorizes or is subject to the debit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debiting Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: Debiting Bank (Customers Bank): The bank that holds the customers account and deducts the funds.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Creditor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Creditor / Beneficiary: The person or organization that receives the funds from the debit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Creditor’s Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: Creditors Bank (Receiving Bank): The bank that receives the funds and credits them to the beneficiarys account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Merchant
x-enumeration-literals.description: Merchant / Service Provider: The business that initiates the debit request for payment (e.g., for goods, services, or bills).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: A government or official body that ensures the debit arrangement complies with financial laws and regulations.
